div.div: Saikyou no Ousama, Nidome no Jinsei wa Nani wo Suru? 2nd Season
The second season of Saikyou no Ousama, Nidome no Jinsei wa Nani wo Suru? Arthur faces one last mission with Jasmine, but the quest unleashes a tragedy no one saw coming. (Source: Crunchyoll News)
